speaker: Bree
content: Good. I have a question for you. Do you remember when you proposed?

speaker: Bree
content: We sat on Skyline Drive and drank a bottle of apple wine.
mark: Skyline Drive 天际线公路 Drive 大道

speaker: Bree
content: And when we finished it, you turned to me, and you said, "if you marry me, Bree Mason, I promise to love you for the rest of my life."

speaker: Bree
content: And even though I was engaged to Ty Grant, and even though my father didn't like you, I said yes.
mark: even though 尽管，虽然; 即使，纵然
engaged  adj. 已订婚的；从事……的，忙于……的；电话占线的； engage v.雇用，聘请；参加，从事；吸引，引起；与……交战，开战；
engaged to sb 与某人订婚
engaged with sb 与某人交往；与某人接洽；与某人忙于某事

speaker: Rex
content: That was a long time ago.
mark: a long time ago 很久以前
That was a long time ago. 那是很久以前的事了

speaker: Bree
content: You're going to cancel the meeting with that divorce lawyer, and we're going to find ourselves a marriage counselor.
mark: counselor n. 顾问，咨询师；律师，法律顾问

speaker: Bree
content: Good. I'm going to make myself some warm milk. Would you like something to drink?
mark: make myself sth 自己动手做某物给自己用

speaker: Rex
mark: Anything but sth 除……之外什么都行
